title: tricliceras longepedunculatum
intro: Tricliceras longepedunculatum, also known as the long-stalked Tricliceras, is a plant species belonging to the family Passifloraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Tricliceras longepedunculatum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
